briefdescription.para: Container of child view handles (in add order).

detaileddescription.para: Per-child layout state (measured size, arranged bounds) is owned by the child view itself (ViewImpl). Layout managers that need a mutable working buffer (flex-basis/grow/shrink, stack weight distribution, etc.) allocate one locally per Measure/Arrange call.

briefdescription.para: Adds a raw (non-View) Actor as a child of the given View.

detaileddescription.para: View::OnChildAdd normally asserts when the added child cannot be DownCast to Ui::View. This Integration helper bypasses that check so internal modules can attach supporting Actors (clipping stencils, render-effect roots, decoration layers, etc.) without violating the View-only invariant for application code.

The added Actor is NOT tracked in the View's child container and therefore is excluded from the View's measure/arrange layout pass. The caller is fully responsible for the Actor's size, position, and lifecycle.

parameterdescription.para: The parent View to add to.
The raw Actor to attach as a child.

briefdescription.para: Sets trait data on a View.

detaileddescription.para: If the stored object implements TraitInterface, lifecycle callbacks (OnBeforeAttached, OnAttached, OnDetached, OnViewDestroying) are invoked. Otherwise the object is stored without callbacks.

parameterdescription.para: The view implementation to attach to
The key to identify the trait

briefdescription.para: Gets trait data from a View.

parameterdescription.para: The key to identify the trait

simplesect.para: The stored handle, or an empty handle if not found

briefdescription.para: Removes trait data from a View.

parameterdescription.para: The key to identify the trait

simplesect.para: true if the trait was found and removed

memberdef.argsstring: (ViewImpl &viewImpl, ViewState state, bool on, InputEvent cause=InputEvent::None())
memberdef.name: SetState

briefdescription.para: Updates a state bit in the view's ViewState and emits StateChangedSignal.

parameterdescription.para: The state to set or clear
True to add the state, false to remove it
Input event that triggered the change; leave default if programmatic

briefdescription.para: Internal helper for WhenStateChanged templates.
Removes a named state-change handler.

simplesect.para: True if a handler was found and removed

briefdescription.para: Removes a named state-change handler only if it is not currently being processed.

simplesect.para: True if removed, false if currently processing or not found

memberdef.argsstring: (Ui::View view, ViewState state, bool on, InputEvent cause=InputEvent::None())
memberdef.name: SetState

briefdescription.para: Updates a state bit in the view's ViewState and emits StateChangedSignal.

parameterdescription.para: The state to set or clear
True to add the state, false to remove it
Input event that triggered the change; leave default if programmatic

briefdescription.para: Internal helper for WhenStateChanged templates (View overload).
Removes a named state-change handler.

simplesect.para: True if a handler was found and removed

briefdescription.para: Removes a named state-change handler only if it is not currently being processed.

simplesect.para: True if removed, false if currently processing or not found

briefdescription.para: Convenience: returns true if LayoutMode is Standalone.

simplesect.para: True if the view's layout mode is Standalone

briefdescription.para: Gets the children container from a view.
Gets the children container from a view.
Returns whether this view is a Layout container.

simplesect.para: True if the view is a Layout (i.e. Ui::Layout::DownCast succeeds)

briefdescription.para: Gets trait data from a View and DownCasts to the specified handle type.

parameterdescription.para: A handle class that provides a static DownCast(BaseHandle) method
The key to identify the trait

simplesect.para: The DownCast handle, or an empty handle if not found or cast fails

memberdef.argsstring: (ViewImpl &viewImpl, const Dali::String &id, X *obj, void(X::*func)(Ui::View, const StateEvent &))
memberdef.name: WhenStateChanged

briefdescription.para: Registers a named state-change handler using a member function.

parameterdescription.para: Object whose member function will be called
Member function with signature void(View, const StateEvent&)

briefdescription.para: Registers a named state-change handler using a callable (e.g. lambda).

parameterdescription.para: Callable with signature void(View, const StateEvent&)

memberdef.argsstring: (Ui::View view, const Dali::String &id, X *obj, void(X::*func)(Ui::View, const StateEvent &))
memberdef.name: WhenStateChanged

briefdescription.para: Registers a named state-change handler using a member function.

parameterdescription.para: Object whose member function will be called
Member function with signature void(View, const StateEvent&)

briefdescription.para: Registers a named state-change handler using a callable (e.g. lambda).

parameterdescription.para: Callable with signature void(View, const StateEvent&)
